codeReview.summary: Implementation is correct and functional. All 7 tests pass. Project/User/Task memory blocks with auto-loading via DefaultBlockLoader and context assembly via ContextAssembler are properly implemented.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker attempted to use 'rust-worker' skill per features.json but the skill did not exist. Worker used 'Rust' skill instead and followed appropriate Rust patterns. The features.json skillName may need updating or the rust-worker skill should be created.

The PROJECT_CONVENTIONS label constant is defined but not used in create_project_block - architecture and conventions are combined into a single 'project:architecture' label. This is not a bug but may be worth documenting if separate project block types are planned.

summary: Feature memory-memory-blocks passes review. Implementation correctly provides MemoryBlocks struct with Project/User/Task block types, DefaultBlockLoader for auto-loading blocks per agent/repository context, ContextAssembler for assembling AgentContext from memory blocks, and helper functions for creating labeled memory entries. All 7 unit tests pass and the workspace builds successfully. No blocking issues found.
